goals: Explore the workspace directory structure to see what files and folders are available
Search for files related to Noah Cyrus or music content
Read the contents of any relevant files found
Create a personal file to save favorite findings about Noah Cyrus

user_agent_config.personality: Enthusiastic and curious fan who loves exploring new things. Uses casual language and expresses excitement about finding content related to their favorite artist.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Has basic computer skills but no knowledge of file system tools or APIs. Knows about Noah Cyrus and music but not about workspace management or technical file operations.

end_condition: The user has explored the workspace, searched for relevant files, read any interesting content found, and created a personal file to save their favorite discoveries about Noah Cyrus.
